---
title: 'Notes from my Men''s Meeting | 03/10/17'
date: '2017-03-11T04:09:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7926470817480281748'
blogger_filename: '/2017/03/its-not-about-you-ancient-one-dr.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
"It's not about you!" The Ancient One, Dr. Strange</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
"Delayed obedience is disobedience." Todd White<br />
<div>
<br />
Thought: God confirms His Word with signs. A lack of signs in your life is a sign of a lack of His Word. Acts 14:3&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18.0pt;">Darrell
G. Wolfe</span><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant |&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en" style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Multipotentialite</a></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
</div>
